svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 28px; margin-left: 550px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: HOL ブロッキングが発生する 3 つの層

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 75px; margin-left: 57px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #2e5cb8;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2e5cb8, #7ca4f3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ① アプリ層 ── HTTP/1.1 パイプライン

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 99px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
同一 TCP 接続でリクエストを順番に投入。応答も投入順に返す制約があり、
先頭のレスポンス R1 が遅いと後続 R2/R3 が完成済みでも送り出せない。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 205px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: クライアント

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 205px; margin-left: 901px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: サーバ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 154px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: REQ1 → 重い処理 (DB 集計)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 192px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: REQ2 → キャッシュ Hit (即時)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 230px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: REQ3 → 静的アセット (即時)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 195px; margin-left: 561px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #8a1a1a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#8a1a1a, #ffaeae); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
R1 完成までは
R2/R3 を返送不可
＝ HOL ブロック

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 315px; margin-left: 57px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #7a5d00;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7a5d00, #b79e4e); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ② トランスポート層 ── TCP の単一バイトストリーム

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 339px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
TCP は順序保証付き単一ストリーム。途中セグメントが 1 つでも欠落すると、
再送が完了するまで後続到着済みセグメントも上位層へ渡せない。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 101px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Seg #1
到着

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Seg #2
✗ 紛失

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 341px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Seg #3
到着済

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 461px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Seg #4
到着済

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 488px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 86px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
受信バッファ
（カーネル）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 440px; margin-left: 621px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #8a1a1a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#8a1a1a, #ffaeae); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Seg #2 が再送で到着するまで、
#3 #4 は受信バッファ内に保留され
アプリ read() に渡されない

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 555px; margin-left: 57px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #3a8a3a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3a8a3a, #589d58); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ③ ハードウェア層 ── 入力バッファ型スイッチ (FIFO)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 579px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
入力ポートの FIFO 先頭パケットの宛先出力ポートが他フローで占有されていると、
後続パケットの宛先が空いていても発射できない（最大スループット理論値 ≈ 58.6%）。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 685px; margin-left: 81px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 入力 1 FIFO

div.div:
出力 3 は空でも
FIFO 規律のため
後続 2 件が発射できない
